name: Thyroid Nuclear Scan
description: Nuclear medicine thyroid scan for function evaluation

findings.technique: Thyroid scintigraphy was performed with Tc-99m pertechnetate.

sections.name: Thyroid Gland

sections.content: Thyroid uptake [is within normal limits / __% at 2 hours]. Normal function.

impression:
1. Normal thyroid scan.
2. No cold nodules to suggest malignancy.
